rulings.Case Title: MARY GLASPIE FRANK VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Prosecute And Bring The Matter To Trial; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 3, 2018, line 1. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Prosecute And Bring The Matter To Trial GRANTED. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 3, 2018, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT RSM&A FORECLOSURE SERVICES, LLC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 3, 2018, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT RSM&A FORECLOSURE SERVICES, LLC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the causes of action for equitable indemnity and breach of contract. Allegations in the complaint are sufficient to state these causes of action, to show that these causes of action are not barred by the good faith settlement or statute of limitations. Demurrer to the cause of action for declaratory relief is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Declaratory relief operates prospectively, serving to set controversies at rest and is not available where only past wrongs are involved, i.e. where there is an accrued cause of action for an actual breach of contract or other wrongful act. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: BRENDA ANDERSON VS. MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 3, 2018, line 3. DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA XXII, LP, MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained. Demurrer to cause of action for violation of Health and Safety Code 17920.3 is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff concedes that there is no private right of action under this statute. Demurrer is otherwise sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts, not conclusions, to support each element of each cause of action. All amendments shall be in bold type. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: BRENDA ANDERSON VS. MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 3, 2018, line 3. DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA XXII, LP, MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts, not conclusions, giving rise to request for punitive damages against the moving defendants. All amendments shall be in bold type. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: EVELYN BOWENS VS. BRENDA BOWENS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 3, 2018, line 4. PLAINTIFF EVELYN BOWENS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel OFF CALENDAR, moot. Substitution of attorney filed on April 24, 2018. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: REZA MOINI NAZERI VS. ALI MOINI NAZERI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 3, 2018, line 5. DEFENDANT ALI NAZERI, AKBAR NAZERI DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege basis for his equitable claim to title, including but not limited to, the terms of the oral contract; the parties to the contract; facts addressing the issue of Statute of Frauds; any facts addressing the issue of Statute of Limitations (accrual or delayed discovery). Plaintiff must also allege facts regarding present actual controversy. All amendments shall be in bold font. The Court notes that parties again chose not to comply with SFLR. Moving party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint; opposing party failed to provide a courtesy copy of opposition. Both parties have been warned that compliance is mandatory and ordered to comply with rules on September 12, 2017. Any non-compliance in future will result in motions being taken off calendar or granted as unopposed. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER E. MILLER VS. JEFFERSON HILL ET AL
